sentences.sentence: Picture this scene.
sentences.translation: 想象一下这个场景。
difficult_points: Picture 在这里是祈使句中的动词，意思是“想象”。
this scene 指下文即将展开的课堂情境，起到引入例子的作用。

sentences.sentence: It's an English literature lesson in a UK school, and the teacher has just read an extract from Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet with a class of 15-year-olds.
sentences.translation: 这是一所英国学校里的英语文学课，老师刚刚和一班15岁的学生一起读完莎士比亚《罗密欧与朱丽叶》的一段选文。

structure.text: It's an English literature lesson in a UK school
and the teacher has just read an extract from Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet with a class of 15-year-olds

difficult_points: It's 是 It is 的缩写，指代当前课堂场景。
has just read 是现在完成时，强调“刚刚读完”这一结果。
from Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet 后置说明 extract 的出处。
with a class of 15-year-olds 表示老师和学生一起阅读，而不是“带着一段选文”。

sentences.sentence: He's given some of the students copies of No Fear Shakespeare, a kid-friendly translation of the original.
sentences.translation: 他给其中一些学生发了《无惧莎士比亚》的本子，这是原作的儿童友好版译文。

structure.text: a kid-friendly translation of the original

difficult_points: He's given 是 He has given 的缩写，使用现在完成时承接前一句课堂动作。
some of the students 是间接宾语，copies of No Fear Shakespeare 是直接宾语。
a kid-friendly translation of the original 是同位语，解释 No Fear Shakespeare 的性质。

expressions.meaning_zh: 适合儿童的；儿童友好的

sentences.sentence: For three students, even these literacy demands are beyond them.
sentences.translation: 对三名学生来说，即便这样的读写要求也超出了他们的能力范围。
difficult_points: For three students 放在句首，限定评价适用的对象。
even 强调连简化后的读写要求都太难。
beyond them 是能力范围之外的意思，不是空间上的“在他们之外”。

sentences.sentence: Another girl simply can't focus and he gives her pens and paper to draw with.
sentences.translation: 另一个女孩就是无法集中注意力，于是老师给她笔和纸让她画画。

structure.text: and he gives her pens and paper to draw with

difficult_points: simply 表示“就是、实在”，强调无法专注的状态。
and 连接两个连续动作，后半句说明教师的应对方式。
to draw with 后置修饰 pens and paper，with 的宾语由前面的 pens and paper 承担。

sentences.sentence: The teacher can ask the No Fear group to identify the key characters and maybe provide a tentative plot summary.
sentences.translation: 老师可以让使用《无惧莎士比亚》的那组学生指出关键人物，也许还能给出一个初步的情节概述。

structure.text: to identify the key characters and maybe provide a tentative plot summary
identify the key characters and maybe provide a tentative plot summary

difficult_points: ask somebody to do something 结构中，to identify... 是对学生任务的说明。
the No Fear group 指使用简化译本的学生组，不是正式组织名称。
maybe provide 与 identify 并列，共同受 to 支配。
tentative 表示“试探性的、初步的”，说明摘要不要求完整确定。

sentences.sentence: He can ask most of the class about character development, and five of them might be able to support their statements with textual evidence.
sentences.translation: 他可以询问班上大多数学生关于人物发展的看法，其中五个学生或许能够用文本证据来支持自己的陈述。

structure.text: He can ask most of the class about character development
and five of them might be able to support their statements with textual evidence

difficult_points: most of the class 指班上大多数人，class 在这里表示学生群体。
might be able to 表示能力上的可能性，语气比 can 更不确定。
support their statements with textual evidence 是学术阅读中常见的“用文本证据支持观点”。

expressions.text: support their statements with textual evidence
expressions.meaning_zh: 用文本证据支持自己的陈述

sentences.sentence: Now two curious students are wondering whether Shakespeare advocates living a life of moderation or one of passionate engagement.
sentences.translation: 现在，有两个好奇的学生正在思考，莎士比亚究竟是主张过一种节制的生活，还是一种充满激情投入的生活。

structure.text: whether Shakespeare advocates living a life of moderation or one of passionate engagement
living a life of moderation or one of passionate engagement

difficult_points: whether 引导 wondering 的宾语从句，表达学生思考的具体问题。
advocates 后接动名词 living，表示“主张过……生活”。
one of passionate engagement 中 one 代替 life，避免重复。
moderation 与 passionate engagement 构成两种生活态度的对比。

sentences.sentence: As a teacher myself, I'd think my lesson would be going rather well if the discussion went as described above.
sentences.translation: 作为一名教师，如果课堂讨论能像上面描述的那样进行，我会认为自己的课上得相当不错。

structure.text: my lesson would be going rather well
if the discussion went as described above

difficult_points: As a teacher myself 表明作者以教师身份进行评价。
I'd think 是 I would think，would 使语气更假设、更委婉。
if 引导条件状语从句，went as described above 指讨论按上文方式进行。
as described above 省略了 it was，意思是“如上所述”。

sentences.sentence: But wouldn't this kind of class work better if there weren't such a huge gap between the top and the bottom?
sentences.translation: 但如果优秀学生和较弱学生之间没有这么大的差距，这种课堂不是会运作得更好吗？

structure.text: wouldn't this kind of class work better
if there weren't such a huge gap between the top and the bottom
between the top and the bottom

difficult_points: wouldn't...if... 构成反问式假设，暗示按能力分班似乎更合理。
there weren't 是虚拟语气中的过去式形式，表示与现实相反或假设的条件。
the top and the bottom 指能力最强与最弱的学生群体，不是空间位置。

sentences.sentence: If we put all the kids who needed literacy support into one class, and all the students who want to discuss the virtue of moderation into another?
sentences.translation: 如果我们把所有需要读写支持的孩子放进一个班，而把所有想讨论节制这一美德的学生放进另一个班呢？

structure.text: If we put all the kids who needed literacy support into one class
all the kids who needed literacy support
and all the students who want to discuss the virtue of moderation into another
who want to discuss the virtue of moderation

difficult_points: 这是一句省略主句的条件问句，完整含义是“这样做会不会更好”。
who needed literacy support 和 who want to discuss... 分别后置修饰两类学生。
into another 省略了 class，表示放进另一个班级。
needed 与 want 时态不同，前者描述前面设想中的需要，后者描述当前愿望。

sentences.sentence: The practice of 'streaming', or 'tracking', involves separating students into classes depending on their diagnosed levels of attainment.
sentences.translation: “分流”或“追踪分班”这种做法，是根据学生被诊断出的成就水平把他们分到不同班级。

structure.text: depending on their diagnosed levels of attainment

difficult_points: streaming 和 tracking 是同位替代表达，都指按能力或成绩分组的做法。
involves 后接动名词 separating，说明这种做法包含的动作。
depending on... 是现在分词短语，说明分班依据。
diagnosed levels of attainment 指经评估认定的成就水平。

sentences.sentence: At a macro level, it requires the establishment of academically selective schools for the brightest students, and comprehensive schools for the rest.
sentences.translation: 在宏观层面，它要求为最聪明的学生设立学业选拔性学校，并为其余学生设立综合学校。

structure.text: the establishment of academically selective schools for the brightest students, and comprehensive schools for the rest

difficult_points: it 指上一句中的 streaming/tracking 这种制度。
At a macro level 表示从整个教育系统层面看，而非单个班级内。
academically selective schools 与 comprehensive schools 构成对照。
for the rest 中 the rest 指除最优秀学生之外的其他学生。

sentences.sentence: Within schools, it means selecting students into a 'stream' of general ability, or 'sets' of subject-specific ability.
sentences.translation: 在学校内部，它意味着把学生选入按总体能力划分的“流”，或者按具体学科能力划分的“组”。

structure.text: selecting students into a 'stream' of general ability, or 'sets' of subject-specific ability

difficult_points: Within schools 将讨论范围从制度层面转向学校内部安排。
means 后接动名词 selecting，解释这种做法在校内如何体现。
'stream' of general ability 与 'sets' of subject-specific ability 区分总体能力分流和单科能力分组。

sentences.sentence: The practice is intuitively appealing to almost every stakeholder.
sentences.translation: 这种做法在直觉上几乎会吸引每一个利益相关者。
difficult_points: The practice 回指前文的 streaming/tracking。
intuitively appealing 表示不经深入分析就让人觉得有吸引力。
stakeholder 指与教育安排有利害关系的人，如学生、家长、教师和学校。

sentences.sentence: I have heard the mixed-ability model attacked by way of analogy: a group hike.
sentences.translation: 我曾听人用类比的方式攻击混合能力教学模式：一次集体徒步。
difficult_points: have heard 表示作者曾经听到过这种说法。
the mixed-ability model attacked 是 hear + 宾语 + 过去分词结构，attacked 表示该模式“被攻击”。
by way of analogy 表示通过类比来论证。
冒号后的 a group hike 是类比的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: The fittest in the group take the lead and set a brisk pace, only to have to stop and wait every 20 minutes.
sentences.translation: 队伍中体能最好的人走在前面并设定很快的速度，结果却不得不每20分钟停下来等待一次。

structure.text: take the lead and set a brisk pace
only to have to stop and wait every 20 minutes

difficult_points: The fittest 是“the + 最高级”名词化，指体能最好的人。
take the lead and set a brisk pace 是并列动作，描述领先者的行为。
only to do 常表示出乎意料或令人失望的结果。
have to stop and wait 表示他们被迫停下等后面的人。

sentences.sentence: This is frustrating, and their enthusiasm wanes.
sentences.translation: 这令人沮丧，他们的热情也逐渐减退。
difficult_points: This 指前一句中反复停下等待的经历。
frustrating 描述事情令人沮丧，而不是人感到沮丧。
wanes 表示逐渐减弱，用来描写 enthusiasm 的下降。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, the slowest ones are not only embarrassed but physically struggling to keep up.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，最慢的人不但感到尴尬，而且在身体上也很吃力地试图跟上。

structure.text: are not only embarrassed but physically struggling
not only embarrassed but physically struggling

difficult_points: Meanwhile 表示镜头转向队伍中最慢的人。
not only...but... 连接 embarrassed 和 physically struggling，强调双重困境。
to keep up 表示努力跟上队伍速度，是 struggling 的目的或内容。

sentences.sentence: What's worse, they never get a long enough break.
sentences.translation: 更糟的是，他们从来得不到足够长的休息。
difficult_points: What's worse 是插入式话语标记，用来添加更严重的问题。
never 强调这种休息不足不是偶然发生。
long enough 中 enough 后置修饰形容词 long，表示“足够长”。

sentences.sentence: They honestly just want to quit.
sentences.translation: 他们真心只想放弃。
difficult_points: honestly 强调说话者认为这种感受是真实直接的。
just want to quit 表示愿望被压缩到“只想退出”这一点。
quit 在徒步类比中指放弃继续走，也影射学生放弃学习。

sentences.sentence: Hiking, they feel, is not for them.
sentences.translation: 他们觉得，徒步并不适合自己。
difficult_points: Hiking 被提前作主语，突出讨论对象。
they feel 是插入语，表示这是最慢者的主观感受。
is not for them 意思是“不适合他们”，不是“不是给他们的”。

sentences.sentence: Mixed-ability classes bore students, frustrate parents and burn out teachers.
sentences.translation: 混合能力班让学生感到无聊，让家长感到沮丧，也让教师筋疲力尽。

structure.text: bore students, frustrate parents and burn out teachers

difficult_points: 三个并列动词 bore、frustrate、burn out 共同说明混合班的负面影响。
Mixed-ability classes 是复合形容词修饰 classes，表示学生能力混合的班级。
burn out teachers 指使教师精疲力竭或职业倦怠。

expressions.meaning_zh: 使精疲力竭；使职业倦怠

sentences.sentence: The brightest ones will never summit Mount Qomolangma, and the stragglers won't enjoy the lovely stroll in the park they are perhaps more suited to.
sentences.translation: 最优秀的人永远无法登顶珠穆朗玛峰，而落在后面的人也享受不到他们或许更适合的公园悠闲散步。

structure.text: The brightest ones will never summit Mount Qomolangma
and the stragglers won't enjoy the lovely stroll in the park they are perhaps more suited to
the lovely stroll in the park they are perhaps more suited to
they are perhaps more suited to

difficult_points: summit 在这里作动词，表示登顶。
The brightest ones 与 the stragglers 分别对应能力最强和落后的学生。
they are perhaps more suited to 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 stroll in the park。
Mount Qomolangma 与 stroll in the park 延续徒步类比，形成难度对比。

expressions.meaning_zh: 公园里的散步；轻松活动

sentences.sentence: Individuals suffer at the demands of the collective, mediocrity prevails.
sentences.translation: 个人在集体要求下受苦，平庸于是占了上风。

structure.text: Individuals suffer at the demands of the collective
at the demands of the collective

difficult_points: 两个独立分句用逗号连接，形成简短有力的总结。
at the demands of the collective 表示由于集体的要求而受损。
mediocrity prevails 是抽象名词作主语，表示“平庸占上风”。

sentences.sentence: So: is learning like hiking?
sentences.translation: 那么：学习像徒步一样吗？
difficult_points: So 后的冒号引出作者要正式检验的问题。
learning 是动名词作主语，指学习这件事。
like hiking 延续前文类比，作者接下来将质疑这个类比。

sentences.sentence: The current pedagogical paradigm is arguably that of constructivism, which emerged out of the work of psychologist Lev Vygotsky.
sentences.translation: 当前的教育学范式可以说是建构主义，这一范式源自心理学家列夫·维果茨基的研究。

structure.text: which emerged out of the work of psychologist Lev Vygotsky
out of the work of psychologist Lev Vygotsky

difficult_points: that of constructivism 中 that 代替 paradigm，避免重复。
arguably 表示“可以说”，说明作者承认这是一个可讨论的判断。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明建构主义的来源。
emerged out of 表示从某项工作或思想中发展出来。

sentences.sentence: In the 1930s, Vygotsky emphasised the importance of targeting a student's specific 'zone of proximal development' (ZPD).
sentences.translation: 在20世纪30年代，维果茨基强调了针对学生特定“最近发展区”（ZPD）的重要性。

structure.text: the importance of targeting a student's specific 'zone of proximal development' (ZPD)
of targeting a student's specific 'zone of proximal development' (ZPD)

difficult_points: emphasised the importance of 后接动名词 targeting，表示强调某种做法的重要性。
'zone of proximal development' 是专业术语，后面的 (ZPD) 给出缩写。
a student's specific 表示教学应针对每个学生具体的最近发展区。

sentences.sentence: This is the gap between what they can achieve only with support – teachers, textbooks, worked examples, parents and so on – and what they can achieve independently.
sentences.translation: 这指的是他们只有在支持下——例如教师、教材、示范例题、父母等等——才能达到的水平，与他们能够独立达到的水平之间的差距。

structure.text: the gap between what they can achieve only with support – teachers, textbooks, worked examples, parents and so on – and what they can achieve independently
what they can achieve only with support

difficult_points: This 指上一句中的 ZPD。
between...and... 连接两个 what 名词性从句，定义这个“差距”的两端。
破折号中的 teachers, textbooks, worked examples, parents and so on 是 support 的例子。
independently 与 only with support 形成对比。

sentences.sentence: The purpose of teaching is to provide and then gradually remove this 'scaffolding' until they are autonomous.
sentences.translation: 教学的目的就是先提供这种“脚手架式支持”，然后逐步撤除，直到学生能够自主学习。

structure.text: to provide and then gradually remove this 'scaffolding'

difficult_points: The purpose of teaching 作主语，to provide... 作表语说明目的内容。
provide and then gradually remove 表示先支持再逐步撤除的教学过程。
'scaffolding' 是比喻，指帮助学习者完成暂时还不能独立完成任务的支持。
until 引导时间状语从句，说明撤除支持持续到学生自主为止。

sentences.sentence: If we accept this model, it follows that streaming students with similar ZPDs would be an efficient and effective solution.
sentences.translation: 如果我们接受这一模型，那么顺理成章的结论就是，把具有相似最近发展区的学生分流会是一种高效且有效的解决方案。

structure.text: that streaming students with similar ZPDs would be an efficient and effective solution

difficult_points: If 引导条件从句，表示在接受建构主义模型的前提下推理。
it follows that... 是固定句式，意思是“由此可得出……”。
streaming students with similar ZPDs 是动名词短语作 that 从句主语。
would be 表示在这一假设前提下的推论。

expressions.meaning_zh: 高效且有效的解决方案

sentences.sentence: And that forcing everyone on the same hike – regardless of aptitude – would be madness.
sentences.translation: 并且，把所有人都强行放到同一次徒步中——不管能力如何——会是疯狂之举。

structure.text: that forcing everyone on the same hike – regardless of aptitude – would be madness
forcing everyone on the same hike

difficult_points: 句首 And that 承接上一句 it follows that，引出第二个并列推论。
forcing everyone on the same hike 是动名词短语，借用徒步类比指把所有学生放在同一学习路径上。
regardless of aptitude 是插入性的介词短语，强调不考虑能力差异。
would be madness 表示在该模型下这种做法会显得荒唐。

sentences.sentence: Despite all this, there is limited empirical evidence to suggest that streaming results in better outcomes for students.
sentences.translation: 尽管如此，能够表明分流会给学生带来更好结果的实证证据仍然有限。

structure.text: to suggest that streaming results in better outcomes for students
that streaming results in better outcomes for students

difficult_points: Despite all this 与上一段推理形成转折，意思是“尽管这些理由看似成立”。
there is limited empirical evidence 是存在句，核心信息是证据有限。
to suggest that... 后置修饰 evidence，说明证据可能支持的结论。
streaming results in better outcomes 是 that 从句的主干。

sentences.sentence: Professor John Hattie, director of the Melbourne Education Research Institute, notes that 'tracking has minimal effects on learning outcomes'.
sentences.translation: 墨尔本教育研究所所长约翰·哈蒂教授指出，“追踪分班对学习结果的影响极小”。

structure.text: director of the Melbourne Education Research Institute
that 'tracking has minimal effects on learning outcomes'
'tracking has minimal effects on learning outcomes'

difficult_points: director of... 是同位语，补充说明 John Hattie 的身份。
notes that 引出专家观点，that 后接完整宾语从句。
引号中的 tracking 指前文的 streaming/tracking。
minimal effects 表示影响很小，不是完全没有影响。

sentences.sentence: What is more, streaming appears to significantly – and negatively – affect those students assigned to the lowest sets.
sentences.translation: 更重要的是，分流似乎会显著且负面地影响那些被分到最低组别的学生。

structure.text: appears to significantly – and negatively – affect
those students assigned to the lowest sets

difficult_points: What is more 用来递进，表示接下来是更进一步的问题。
appears to 表示“似乎”，保留学术论述中的谨慎语气。
significantly – and negatively – 中破折号强调影响不仅显著而且是负面的。
assigned to the lowest sets 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 those students。

sentences.sentence: These students tend to have much higher representation of low socioeconomic class.
sentences.translation: 这些学生中来自低社会经济阶层的比例往往高得多。

structure.text: much higher representation of low socioeconomic class

difficult_points: These students 指被分到最低组别的学生。
tend to have 表示一种倾向，而非绝对情况。
higher representation of low socioeconomic class 意味着低社会经济阶层学生占比更高。
socioeconomic 是社会与经济因素合成的形容词。

sentences.sentence: Less significant is the small benefit for those lucky clever students in the higher sets.
sentences.translation: 相对不那么显著的，是那些幸运地进入较高组别的聪明学生所获得的小小好处。

structure.text: the small benefit for those lucky clever students in the higher sets

difficult_points: 这是表语前置结构，正常语序是 the small benefit... is less significant。
Less significant 与上一句对低组学生的负面影响形成对比。
those lucky clever students 指既聪明又被分入高组的学生。
the higher sets 指能力分组中较高层级的班组。

sentences.sentence: The overall result is that the smart stay smart and the dumb get dumber, further entrenching the social divide.
sentences.translation: 总体结果就是聪明的仍然聪明，较弱的变得更弱，从而进一步固化社会分化。

structure.text: that the smart stay smart and the dumb get dumber
the smart stay smart and the dumb get dumber

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明 overall result 的具体内容。
the smart 和 the dumb 是“the + 形容词”名词化，分别指聪明者和较弱者。
stay smart 与 get dumber 对比，突出差距扩大。
further entrenching... 是现在分词短语，说明这种结果带来的进一步影响。

sentences.sentence: In the latest update of Hattie's influential meta-analysis of factors influencing student achievement, one of the most significant factors is the teachers' estimate of achievement.
sentences.translation: 在哈蒂关于影响学生成绩因素的有影响力的元分析的最新更新中，最重要的因素之一是教师对成绩的估计。

structure.text: In the latest update of Hattie's influential meta-analysis of factors influencing student achievement
one of the most significant factors
is the teachers' estimate of achievement

difficult_points: 句首介词短语很长，核心是 In the latest update。
influencing student achievement 是现在分词短语，修饰 factors。
one of the most significant factors 作主语，谓语用单数 is。
the teachers' estimate of achievement 指教师对学生成绩或能力的预估。

expressions.text: one of the most significant factors

sentences.sentence: Streaming students by diagnosed achievement automatically limits what the teacher feels the student is capable of.
sentences.translation: 按诊断出的成绩给学生分流，会自动限制教师认为学生能够做到什么。

structure.text: what the teacher feels the student is capable of

difficult_points: Streaming students... 是动名词短语作主语。
by diagnosed achievement 表示按已评估出的成绩进行分组。
what 引导 limits 的宾语从句，表示被限制的内容。
the teacher feels 插入在 what 从句中，后面 the student is capable of 才是教师判断的内容。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, in a mixed environment, teachers' estimates need to be more diverse and flexible.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，在混合环境中，教师的预估需要更加多样且灵活。
difficult_points: Meanwhile 表示与分流环境中的教师预期形成对照。
in a mixed environment 指混合能力课堂或学校环境。
need to be 后接形容词补足语，说明教师判断必须更灵活。
diverse and flexible 是并列形容词，强调估计不能被单一标签固定。

sentences.sentence: While streaming might seem to help teachers effectively target a student's ZPD, it can underestimate the importance of peer-to-peer learning.
sentences.translation: 虽然分流似乎能帮助教师有效瞄准学生的最近发展区，但它可能低估同伴学习的重要性。

structure.text: While streaming might seem to help teachers effectively target a student's ZPD

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，表示承认分流看似有帮助。
might seem to help 语气谨慎，说明只是表面上可能如此。
it 指 streaming 这种做法。
peer-to-peer learning 指学生之间互相学习，后文会展开说明。

expressions.meaning_zh: 瞄准学生的最近发展区

sentences.sentence: A crucial aspect of constructivist theory is the role of the MKO – 'more knowledgeable other' – in knowledge construction.
sentences.translation: 建构主义理论的一个关键方面，是MKO——“更有知识的他者”——在知识建构中的作用。

structure.text: A crucial aspect of constructivist theory
the role of the MKO – 'more knowledgeable other' – in knowledge construction

difficult_points: A crucial aspect... 作主语，句子核心是“一个关键方面是某种作用”。
MKO 后的破折号内容解释该缩写的全称。
in knowledge construction 修饰 role，说明这种角色发挥作用的领域。
constructivist theory 与前文 constructivism 呼应。

sentences.sentence: While teachers are traditionally the MKOs in classrooms, the value of knowledgeable student peers must not go unrecognised either.
sentences.translation: 虽然教师传统上是课堂中的“更有知识的他者”，但有知识的学生同伴的价值也绝不能被忽视。

structure.text: While teachers are traditionally the MKOs in classrooms
the value of knowledgeable student peers

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，承认教师通常承担 MKO 角色。
the value of knowledgeable student peers 是主句主语，核心词是 value。
must not go unrecognised 是双重否定式表达，意思是“不应被忽视”。
either 与否定结构连用，表示学生同伴的价值也同样不能被忽略。

sentences.sentence: I find it amazing to watch students get over an idea to their peers in ways that I would never think of.
sentences.translation: 我觉得，看学生用我从未想到的方式把一个想法讲给同伴听，是一件很惊人的事。

structure.text: to watch students get over an idea to their peers
that I would never think of

difficult_points: find it amazing to do 中 it 是形式宾语，真正宾语是 to watch...。
get over an idea to their peers 意为把想法传达给同伴。
in ways 后接 that 引导的定语从句，说明这些方式是作者想不到的。
would never think of 表示作者本人通常不会想到这些表达路径。

sentences.sentence: They operate with different language tools and different social tools from teachers and, having just learnt it themselves, they possess similar cognitive structures to their struggling classmates.
sentences.translation: 他们使用的语言工具和社会工具不同于教师，而且由于自己刚刚学会，他们与那些学习吃力的同学拥有相似的认知结构。

structure.text: They operate with different language tools and different social tools from teachers
with different language tools and different social tools
and, having just learnt it themselves, they possess similar cognitive structures to their struggling classmates
similar cognitive structures to their struggling classmates

difficult_points: They 指学生同伴，尤其是刚掌握某知识的学生。
different...from teachers 表示他们使用的语言和社交方式不同于教师。
having just learnt it themselves 是完成式分词短语，说明他们刚学会这一点是拥有相似认知结构的原因。
their struggling classmates 指仍在困难中的同学。

sentences.sentence: There is also something exciting about passing on skills and knowledge that you yourself have just mastered – a certain pride and zeal, a certain freshness to the interaction between 'teacher' and 'learner' that is often lost by the expert for whom the steps are obvious and the joy of discovery forgotten.
sentences.translation: 把你自己刚刚掌握的技能和知识传递出去，也有某种令人兴奋之处——那是一种自豪与热情，是“教师”和“学习者”之间互动的某种新鲜感；而这种新鲜感常常会被专家丢失，因为对专家来说，步骤显而易见，发现的喜悦也已被遗忘。

structure.text: about passing on skills and knowledge that you yourself have just mastered
that you yourself have just mastered
a certain pride and zeal, a certain freshness to the interaction between 'teacher' and 'learner'
that is often lost by the expert for whom the steps are obvious and the joy of discovery forgotten

difficult_points: There is something exciting about... 是存在句，about 后接动名词短语说明令人兴奋的内容。
that you yourself have just mastered 修饰 skills and knowledge，you yourself 强调“你本人”。
破折号后是对 something exciting 的具体解释。
for whom the steps are obvious and the joy of discovery forgotten 是定语从句中的介词提前结构，说明专家为何会失去这种新鲜感。

sentences.sentence: Having a variety of different abilities in a collaborative learning environment provides valuable resources for helping students meet their learning needs, not to mention improving their communication and social skills.
sentences.translation: 在协作学习环境中拥有多种不同能力的学生，为帮助学生满足学习需求提供了宝贵资源，更不用说还能提升他们的沟通和社交技能。

structure.text: Having a variety of different abilities in a collaborative learning environment
valuable resources for helping students meet their learning needs
not to mention improving their communication and social skills

difficult_points: Having... 是动名词短语作主语，指在同一环境中拥有多样能力这一事实。
for helping students meet their learning needs 后置说明 resources 的用途。
meet their learning needs 表示满足学习需求。
not to mention 后接动名词 improving，表示“更不用说还会……”。

sentences.sentence: And today, more than ever, we need the many to flourish – not suffer at the expense of a few bright stars.
sentences.translation: 而在今天，比以往任何时候都更需要多数人蓬勃发展，而不是为了少数耀眼明星付出代价。

structure.text: not suffer at the expense of a few bright stars

difficult_points: more than ever 表示“比以往任何时候都更”。
the many 是“the + 形容词/数量词”结构，指多数人。
need the many to flourish 是 need + 宾语 + 不定式补足语结构。
not suffer at the expense of... 与 to flourish 对比，强调不应牺牲多数人成就少数人。

sentences.sentence: Once a year, I go on a hike with my class, a mixed bunch of students.
sentences.translation: 每年一次，我会和我的班级去徒步，那是一群能力各异的学生。
difficult_points: Once a year 表示频率，放在句首交代作者的实际经历。
go on a hike 与前文徒步类比呼应。
a mixed bunch of students 是 my class 的同位语，说明班级成员能力混合。
mixed 在这里既指能力差异，也呼应 mixed-ability classes。

sentences.sentence: It is challenging.
sentences.translation: 这很有挑战性。
difficult_points: It 指作者带混合班级徒步这件事。
challenging 是形容词作表语，表示这件事有难度。
短句单独成句，承认混合群体活动确实存在挑战。

sentences.sentence: The fittest students realise they need to encourage the reluctant.
sentences.translation: 体能最好的学生意识到，他们需要鼓励那些不情愿的人。

structure.text: they need to encourage the reluctant

difficult_points: realise 后省略 that，引导宾语从句 they need...。
the fittest students 与前文徒步类比中的 The fittest 呼应。
the reluctant 是“the + 形容词”名词化，指不情愿的人。
need to encourage 表明强者的角色从领先转为支持他人。

sentences.sentence: There are lookouts who report back, and extra items to carry for others.
sentences.translation: 有人担任瞭望者并回来报告，也有额外物品需要替别人携带。

structure.text: There are lookouts who report back
and extra items to carry for others

difficult_points: There are 同时引出 lookouts 和 extra items 两类存在的事物或任务。
who report back 是定语从句，修饰 lookouts。
extra items to carry for others 中 to carry 后置修饰 items，表示需要携带的物品。
for others 强调学生之间互相承担责任。

sentences.sentence: We make it – together.
sentences.translation: 我们成功了——一起成功。
difficult_points: make it 是固定表达，表示成功做到或抵达终点。
破折号突出 together，强调成功来自共同协作。
We 与前文只关注强者或弱者的视角形成对照，收束全文论点。
